name: caddy
note: Apache-2.0. Stock Caddy (no plugins) used as the ACME provider on :80 (HTTP-01 challenges + http→https redirect) AND as the panel-subdomain reverse-proxy on internal :8444 (R1-1 / R1-2, v0.0.33). The verify probe issues HEAD http://caddy:80/ from the panel container; Caddy's :80 site redirects every request 308 → https, so a 308 response code confirms the listener is alive. (v0.0.34 — the prior `docker exec` verify failed inside the panel container, which has no docker CLI.)
